ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) for the location */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation for the location (e.g., AF, RAF) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Afghanistan, Africa) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of location (e.g., country, region, area) */,
  "parent_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent location (e.g., a region within a country) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the location in meters */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the location data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location data was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the location is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_location_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_parent_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "location_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "location_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent location type */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the location type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location type was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the location type is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_types_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("location_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the source is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the link */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the link was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the link is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_source_links_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active or disabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the location */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the location was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the location */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
